LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE COURT GRANTS THE PARTIES' UNOPPOSED REQUESTS FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE. PLAINTIFF FILED A CLAIM ON MARCH 11, 2013, WHICH WAS BEYOND THE 6-MONTH STATUTORY PERIOD REQUIRED BY GOVERNMENT CODE 911.2. DEFENDANT RESPONDED TO THE CLAIM BY LETTER DENYING THE CLAIM ON OR ABOUT MARCH 21, 2013 "FOR LACK OF INFORMATION TO EVALUATE WHETHER [CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO] WAS RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY DAMAGES." (PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE, EXHIBIT A.) DEFENDANT DID NOT NOTIFY PLAINTIFF THAT HER CLAIM WAS UNTIMELY. PURSUANT TO GOV. CODE 911.3(B), DEFENDANT HAS WAIVED ITS DEFENSE AS TO THE TIME LIMIT FOR PRESENTING A CLAIM. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MARRIANNE SIOSON, ESQ., 415.398.5000, FOR PLAINTIFF ADA DISON.
FREDERICK SHEINFIELD, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Overruled. The Court grants the parties' unopposed requests for judicial notice. Plaintiff filed a claim on March 11, 2013, which was beyond the 6-month statutory period required by Government Code 911.2. Defendant responded to the claim by letter denying the claim on or about March 21, 2013 "for lack of information to evaluate whether [City and County of San Francisco] was responsible for any damages." (Plaintiff's Request for Judicial Notice, Exhibit A.) Defendant did not notify Plaintiff that her claim was untimely. Pursuant to Gov. Code 911.3(b), Defendant has waived its defense as to the time limit for presenting a claim. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JOHN HENNING, ESQ., 415.758.1382, FOR PLAINTIFF ADA DISON.
FREDERICK SHEINFIELD, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT CONTINUED HEARING ON DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT TO DECEMBER 11, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. COUNSEL WILL FILE ADDITIONAL BRIEFING (NO LONGER THAN 5 PAGES IN LENGTH) NO LATER THAN FRIDAY, NOVEMBER 22, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
